item.title: Trump and Iran issue fresh warnings as standoff continues
item.description: As Trump warns Iran to "get smart soon" and make a deal to end the war, an Iranian lawmaker vows Tehran will "never relinquish its control over the St...

item.title: Man held after 2 hurt in stabbing attack in London, Jewish group says
item.description: London police "deployed a taser" and detained a suspect who was "attempting to stab Jewish members of the public," according to the Shomrim volunteer ...

item.title: Search ends for missing crew of U.S. ship that overturned in typhoon
item.description: Six people were aboard the 145-foot ship, called the Mariana. Divers recovered one crew member's body from the overturned ship.

item.title: Tourist dies after being bitten at snake-charming show in Egypt
item.description: A snake, reported to be a cobra, crawled into the victim's pants and bit him as he watched a show, police said.
